summary: Phase 3 testing complete. All features working correctly: CompanyCard with permanent logo, Nosotros page with mission/vision/values/contact form, EmpresaDetalle with image carousel and mobile quick actions, pagination logic (hidden with <12 items), and Admin Dashboard with top viewed empresas section.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/nosotros-settings returns 200 with mision, vision, valores
Backend: GET /api/nosotros-settings valores contains all 4 expected values
Backend: POST /api/contacto saves contact form successfully
Backend: GET /api/empresas-top-views returns top 5 empresas with view counts
Backend: GET /api/empresas/{slug} increments views counter
Backend: GET /api/empresas returns empresas with all required fields
Backend: GET /api/actividades returns 10 actividades
CompanyCard: Logo is permanently visible (not just on hover)
CompanyCard: Category badge displayed
CompanyCard: Name, address, description visible
CompanyCard: Activity tags displayed (max 3 + count)
FloatingNav: 'Nosotros' link present in navigation bar
Nosotros: Page loads with green forest hero section
Nosotros: Cluster logo in hero
Nosotros: CTA button 'Únete al Clúster' present
Nosotros: Stats bar shows dynamic empresas count (3+) and actividades count (10)
Nosotros: Mission card displays correct text from API
Nosotros: Vision card displays correct text from API
Nosotros: 4 values cards displayed (Sustentabilidad, Seguridad, Comunidad, Pasión por la Tierra)
Nosotros: Contact form has all fields (nombre, email, empresa, mensaje)
Nosotros: Contact form submits successfully with toast notification
Nosotros: Form clears after successful submission
Nosotros: CTA button scrolls to contact form section
EmpresaDetalle: Page loads with image carousel
EmpresaDetalle: Carousel has prev/next arrows
EmpresaDetalle: Carousel has navigation dots (4 dots for hero + 3 gallery)
EmpresaDetalle: Carousel navigation works (click next/prev)
EmpresaDetalle: Mobile quick actions bar visible on mobile viewport
EmpresaDetalle: WhatsApp button visible on mobile
EmpresaDetalle: Call (Llamar) button visible on mobile
EmpresaDetalle: Activities shown with colored badges
EmpresaDetalle: Embedded OpenStreetMap shown for empresas with coordinates
EmpresaDetalle: Gallery shows images in grid layout
EmpresaDetalle: Gallery click-to-enlarge modal works
EmpresaDetalle: Modal closes when clicking outside
EmpresaDetalle: Contact sidebar with phone, email, address visible (desktop)
EmpresaDetalle: Social links section visible
EmpresaDetalle: WhatsApp button in sidebar (desktop)
Empresas: Pagination hidden when < 12 empresas (correct behavior)
Empresas: All 3 empresas displayed on single page
Admin Dashboard: 'Empresas Más Visitadas' section present
Admin Dashboard: Shows top viewed empresas with view counts
Admin Dashboard: Ecomuk shows 10 views after multiple accesses
critical_code_review_comments: CompanyCard.jsx: Well-structured with permanent logo display, proper fallback to TreePine icon
Nosotros.jsx: Clean implementation with dynamic stats from API, smooth scroll to contact form
EmpresaDetalle.jsx: Mobile-first design with sticky quick actions bar, carousel built from hero_url + galeria
Empresas.jsx: Pagination logic correct (PER_PAGE = 12), only shows controls when totalPages > 1
AdminDashboard.jsx: Top viewed empresas section properly fetches from /api/empresas-top-views
server.py: Views counter increments on GET /api/empresas/{slug}, nosotros-settings and contacto endpoints working
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: 3 empresas (Ecomuk, Aventúrate, Test Empresa Upload), 10 actividades. Created test contact form submissions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested and working. CompanyCard shows permanent logo, Nosotros page has all sections (hero, stats, mission/vision, values, contact form), EmpresaDetalle has carousel with hero+gallery images and mobile quick actions bar. Pagination on /empresas only shows when > 12 items (currently 3 empresas so hidden). Admin Dashboard shows 'Empresas Más Visitadas' with view counts. Views counter increments on empresa detail page access.
